deals.Description: A Luxembourg startup focused on space-based solar power, developing radio-frequency wireless power transmission technology. The company is taking a ground-first approach to prove the technology on Earth before scaling to orbit.
Helical develops a virtual AI lab for pharmaceutical research and development, transforming biological foundation models into reproducible drug discovery workflows.
deals.Investors: redalpine, Gradient, BoxGroup, Frst, Aidan Gomez, Clement Delangue, Mario Götze
deals.Founders: Rick Schneider, Maxime Allard, Mathieu Klop

deals.Description: Partao is Europe's largest online marketplace for agricultural and construction spare parts, leveraging AI tools to simplify the procurement process.
deals.Investors: Mangrove Capital Partners, FDA Ventures, founder of Vinted, The Players Fund
deals.Founders: Alex Ootes, Virginia Strong, Wilfried Walczak, Ruud van Engelenhoven

deals.Description: Passbolt is an open-source password and credential manager for teams.
